data.name: GameNotFound
data.value: Game session not found.

data.name: InputTypeMismatch
data.value: The provided input type does not match the expected input type.

data.name: UnexpectedInput
data.value: Received input when no instruction was pending.

data.name: SetupCompletePrompt
data.value: Setup complete. Proceed to Night 1?

data.name: NightStartsPrompt
data.value: The village goes to sleep.

data.name: ActionNotInPhase
data.value: Action ({0}) not valid in phase {1}.

data.name: InternalError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred.

data.name: SimpleVillagerRoleName
data.value: Simple Villager

data.name: SimpleVillagerRoleDescription
data.value: A standard villager with no special abilities.

data.name: SimpleWerewolfRoleName
data.value: Simple Werewolf

data.name: SimpleWerewolfRoleDescription
data.value: A standard werewolf. Wakes with other werewolves to choose a victim.

data.name: WerewolvesChooseVictimPrompt
data.value: Werewolves, wake up and choose one player to eliminate.

data.name: ExactlyOnePlayerMustBeSelected
data.value: You must select exactly one player.

data.name: PlayerIdNotFound
data.value: Player ID {0} not found in this game.

data.name: TargetIsDeadError
data.value: Cannot target {0} because they are already dead.

data.name: TargetIsAllyError
data.value: Cannot target {0} because they are an ally (Werewolf).

data.name: TargetIsSelfError
data.value: You cannot target yourself.

data.name: WerewolvesChoiceRecorded
data.value: Werewolves chose {0}. Night action recorded.

data.name: ResolveNightPrompt
data.value: Night phase complete. Proceed to resolve night actions.

data.name: VictimEliminatedAnnounce
data.value: Player {0} was eliminated during the night.

data.name: RevealRolePrompt
data.value: Reveal the role of the eliminated player ({0})?

data.name: RevealRolePromptSpecify
data.value: Specify the roles of the deceased.

data.name: RoleRevealedLogMessage
data.value: {0} was revealed to be a {1}.

data.name: ProceedToVotePrompt
data.value: Proceed to the daytime debate and vote?

data.name: DebateStartsPrompt
data.value: Daytime debate begins. When finished, confirm to proceed to vote.

data.name: VoteStartsPrompt
data.value: Voting phase. Determine the outcome and report the eliminated player or if it was a tie.

data.name: VoteOutcomeSelectionPrompt
data.value: Report the outcome of the vote. Select the eliminated player or choose 'Tie'.

data.name: VoteOutcomeTie
data.value: Tie

data.name: InvalidVoteOutcome
data.value: Invalid vote outcome reported.

data.name: ResolveVotePrompt
data.value: Proceed to resolve the vote outcome.

data.name: VoteEliminatedAnnounce
data.value: Player {0} was eliminated by the vote.

data.name: VoteTieAnnounce
data.value: The vote resulted in a tie. No one is eliminated.

data.name: ProceedToNightPrompt
data.value: Proceed to the next night?

data.name: VictoryConditionWerewolvesWin
data.value: Werewolves Win! (Werewolf count >= Villager count)

data.name: VictoryConditionVillagersWin
data.value: Villagers Win! (All Werewolves eliminated)

data.name: GameOverMessage
data.value: Game Over! {0}

data.name: IdentifyWerewolvesPrompt
data.value: Identify {0} werewolf players

data.name: PlayerListCannotBeEmpty
data.value: Player list cannot be empty.

data.name: RoleListCannotBeEmpty
data.value: Role list cannot be empty.

data.name: VictoryConditionAllWerewolvesEliminated
data.value: All werewolves eliminated.

data.name: VictoryConditionWerewolvesOutnumber
data.value: Werewolves equal or outnumber villagers.

data.name: PhaseLogicNotImplemented
data.value: Phase {0} logic is not yet implemented.

data.name: WerewolfIdentifyInvalidPlayerCount
data.value: Invalid number of players selected for Werewolf identification. Expected {0}, but got {1}.

data.name: WerewolfIdentifyPlayerAlreadyHasRole
data.value: Player {0} already has a role assigned during Night 1 identification.

data.name: WerewolfIdentifySuccess
data.value: {0} Werewolf players successfully identified.

data.name: SimpleWerewolfNoDayAction
data.value: Simple Werewolves cannot perform actions during the day.

data.name: SimpleVillagerNoIdentification
data.value: Simple Villager role does not require identification.

data.name: SimpleVillagerNoNightAction
data.value: Simple Villager has no night action.

data.name: SimpleVillagerNoDayAction
data.value: Simple Villager has no day action.

data.name: DefaultLogValue
data.value: Unknown

data.name: PlayersEliminatedAnnouncement
data.value: The following players were eliminated: {0}.

data.name: NoOneEliminatedAnnouncement
data.value: No one was eliminated during the night.

data.name: ProceedToDebatePrompt
data.value: Proceed to the day's debate?

data.name: RoleNotSelectedError
data.value: No role was selected.

data.name: RevealTargetNotFoundError
data.value: Could not find the player target for role reveal.

data.name: RoleImplementationNotFound
data.value: Internal error: Role implementation not found for {0}.

data.name: RoleRevealedProceedToDebate
data.value: {0}'s role was {1}. Proceed to debate?

data.name: VotePhaseStartPrompt
data.value: Day vote phase. Please determine the outcome and report the single player eliminated (or report a tie).

data.name: VoteOutcomeInvalidSelection
data.value: Please select exactly one player who was eliminated, or select no one to indicate a tie.

data.name: VoteOutcomeMissingError
data.value: Internal error: Vote outcome was expected but not found.

data.name: VoteResultTieProceedToNight
data.value: The vote resulted in a tie. Proceed to the next night?

data.name: PlayerEliminatedByVoteRevealRole
data.value: {0} was eliminated by the vote. Please reveal their role.

data.name: RoleSeerName
data.value: Seer

data.name: RoleSeerDescription
data.value: Each night, the Seer may discover the true Role of one player.

data.name: InstructionIdentifySeer
data.value: Moderator, please identify the player who is the Seer.

data.name: InstructionSeerChooseTarget
data.value: Seer, choose a player to view their role.

data.name: InstructionSeerNoTargets
data.value: Seer, there are no other living players to target. Confirm to continue.

data.name: InfoSeerResult
data.value: You saw that {0} is {1}.

data.name: InfoSeerSkippedNoTargets
data.value: Seer skipped action as no targets were available.

data.name: RoleDefenderName
data.value: Defender

data.name: RoleDefenderDescription
data.value: Each night, the Defender may choose a player to protect from the Werewolves. They cannot choose the same player two nights in a row.

data.name: InstructionIdentifyDefender
data.value: Moderator, please identify the player who is the Defender.

data.name: InstructionDefenderChooseTarget
data.value: Defender, choose a player to protect tonight (you can choose yourself).

data.name: InstructionDefenderCannotRepeat
data.value: (You cannot protect {0} again this turn).

data.name: ErrorDefenderCannotRepeat
data.value: Rule Violation: The Defender cannot protect the same player ({0}) two nights in a row.

data.name: InfoDefenderProtectionSet
data.value: Defender has chosen to protect {0} tonight.

data.name: RoleWitchName
data.value: Witch

data.name: RoleWitchDescription
data.value: The Witch has two potions: one to save a victim, one to eliminate a player. Each can be used once per game.

data.name: InstructionIdentifyWitch
data.value: Moderator, please identify the player who is the Witch.

data.name: InstructionWitchActionBase
data.value: Witch, the Werewolves targeted {0}.

data.name: InstructionWitchCanHeal
data.value: You can use your Healing potion.

data.name: InstructionWitchCanPoison
data.value: You can use your Poison potion.

data.name: InstructionWitchNoActionAvailable
data.value: Witch, the Werewolves targeted {0}. You have no potions available for this situation. Confirm to continue.

data.name: OptionWitchHeal
data.value: Heal Victim

data.name: OptionWitchPoison
data.value: Use Poison Potion

data.name: OptionWitchSkip
data.value: Skip Action

data.name: ErrorWitchHealUsed
data.value: Rule Violation: Healing potion already used.

data.name: ErrorWitchPoisonUsed
data.value: Rule Violation: Poison potion already used.

data.name: ErrorWitchHealNoVictim
data.value: Rule Violation: Cannot use Healing potion as there was no victim this night.

data.name: ErrorWitchCannotTargetSelfOrVictim
data.value: Rule Violation: Witch cannot use poison on themselves or the Werewolves' victim for the night.

data.name: InfoWitchSkipped
data.value: Witch skipped their action.

data.name: InfoWitchHealUsed
data.value: Witch used the Healing potion on {0}.

data.name: InfoWitchPoisonUsed
data.value: Witch used the Poison potion, targeting {0}.

data.name: RoleUnknownName
data.value: Unknown
data.comment: Used when Seer views player whose role isn't revealed/assigned

data.name: InfoVictimNone
data.value: no one
data.comment: Used in Witch prompt when WWs killed no one

data.name: InstructionWitchPoisonPrompt
data.value: Witch, choose a player to poison, or confirm to skip.

data.name: InstructionWitchHealPrompt
data.value: Witch, the Werewolves targeted {0}. Heal them?

data.name: OptionYes
data.value: Yes

data.name: OptionNo
data.value: No

data.name: OptionSkip
data.value: Skip

data.name: ErrorTargetNotFoundOrDead
data.value: Target player not found or is already dead.

data.name: ErrorWitchCannotTargetSelf
data.value: Rule Violation: The Witch cannot target themselves with the poison potion.

data.name: ErrorWitchCannotTargetVictimWithPoison
data.value: Rule Violation: The Witch cannot target the Werewolves' victim with the poison potion.
